prompt:
A sealed waste container holding absorbent material and neutralized spill residue, resting beside a lab spill tray on a clean bench. It should look securely closed and ready for hazardous-waste pickup, emphasizing containment and orderly cleanup.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with soft bench lighting, realistic plastic and absorbent textures, no logos, no readable labels, and no identifiable faces. Keep the container centered and uncluttered.
